prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025 年该科类最低位次依次约 9564→9316→8300→9109→9598 名，整体在 8300–9600 区间波动，2025 年基准约 9598 名，近两年呈小幅后移态势；2021–2024 年理科计划均为 42 人，2025 年物理类增至 45 人；2026 年物理类计划 42 人，较 2025 年缩招 3 人（-6.7%），名额减少使录取竞争有所加剧。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211 工程、双一流建设高校；软科主榜排名从 2021 年第 81 位持续上升至 2026 年第 72 位，排名稳步提升反映学校综合实力与认可度增强，对考生吸引力上升；近年声誉平稳，无明显负面舆情事件；抖音综合热度排名第 96 位（评价一般），短视频平台曝光度不高，未形成额外报考热度信号；材料科学与工程获评第五轮学科评估 A 级，为学校王牌学科；纺织科学与工程为传统优势领域，相关招生专业（材料类、纺织类）具备学科竞争力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等专 业持续高热推荐，东华大学在上述领域均有对应招生专业，吸引高分考生报考；本省 2026 年考生总数约 37.79 万，较 2025 年物理类+历史类合计约 28.57 万大幅增长约 32%，物理类考生规模预计同步扩大，竞争显著加剧，2025 年物理类本科批 430 分，近年呈小幅波动，未出现剧烈变化；东华大学位于上海，属一线城市高校，对云南考生具备较强地域吸引力；该校在云南招生占比约 2%–3%（2025 年物理类+历史类共 49 人，占全国总计划约 2.8%），属外省招生中等规模省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合 2025 年基准位次 9598 名、2026 年物理类缩招 3 人（竞争加剧）、本省考生总数大幅增长约 32%（竞争显著加剧）、学校软科排名持续上升（吸引力增强）以及计算机/电子信息等热门专业持续高热等多重因素，预计 2026 年录取位次较 2025 年有所前移（更难进）。预测最低位次约 9164 名，区间 8664–9664 名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for this subject category were approximately 9564→9316→8300→9109→9598, fluctuating within the 8300–9600 range. The 2025 baseline is about 9598, showing a slight backward trend in recent two years. From 2021 to 2024, the science plan was 42 students each year; in 2025, the physics category increased to 45 students. In 2026, the physics category plan is 42 students, a reduction of 3 students (-6.7%) compared to 2025, intensifying admission competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting enhanced comprehensive strength and recognition, increasing attractiveness to candidates. In recent years, its reputation has been stable with no significant negative public incidents. Its comprehensive Douyin popularity ranking is 96th (average evaluation), with low short-video platform exposure, not generating additional application heat. Materials Science and Engineering received an A grade in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, making it the university's flagship discipline. Textile Science and Engineering is a traditional advantage area, and related enrollment majors (Materials, Textiles) have disciplinary competitiveness.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering remain highly popular and recommended. Donghua University offers corresponding enrollment majors in these fields, attracting high-scoring candidates. In 2026, the total number of candidates in this province is about 377,900, a significant increase of about 32% compared to the combined total of physics and history categories in 2025 (approximately 285,700). The scale of physics category candidates is expected to expand correspondingly, significantly intensifying competition. In 2025, the physics category undergraduate batch cutoff was 430 points, with slight fluctuations in recent years and no drastic changes. Donghua University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, exerting strong regional appeal to Yunnan candidates. The university's enrollment proportion in Yunnan is about 2%–3% (49 students in physics and history categories combined in 2025, about 2.8% of total national plan), making it a medium-scale enrollment province outside its home region.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 9598, the 2026 physics category enrollment reduction of 3 students (intensified competition), a significant increase of about 32% in total provincial candidates (significantly intensified competition), the university's continuously rising Soft Science ranking (increased attractiveness), and the sustained high popularity of majors like Computer Science and Electronic Information, the 2026 admission ranking is expected to move forward compared to 2025 (harder to enter). The predicted minimum ranking is about 9164, with a range of 8664–9664.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking about 9164, range 8664–9664. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 Materials (A-level discipline) as the main choice, with Tier 1 Computer Science/Electronic Information as a reach, and Tier 3 Management Science and Engineering and Environmental majors as safety options. If ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<8664), focus on reaching for Tier 1 popular majors. If ranking is near the upper limit (>9664), it is recommended to prioritize Tier 3 majors, supplemented by Tier 2 Materials.

历年位次与招生计划.text: Donghua University only enrolled History Category students for the first time in Yunnan Province in 2025, with a minimum ranking of approximately 2302, and limited historical data, making 2025 the sole baseline; the 2025 History Category plan was 4 students; the 2026 History Category plan is 5 students, an increase of 1 student (+25%) compared to 2025, and the increase in slots slightly eases admission competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; the Soft Science main ranking has steadily risen from 81st in 2021 to 72nd in 2026, reflecting the university's improving comprehensive strength and recognition; recent reputation is stable with no significant negative public opinion incidents; Douyin comprehensive popularity ranking is 96th (average evaluation), with low exposure on short video platforms; Materials Science and Engineering received an A grade in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, although it is an engineering advantage, its direct impact on History Category candidates' application decisions is limited.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: History Category enrollment majors are Journalism and Communication (clearly discouraged) and Economics and Management Experimental Class (divided and wait-and-see), with overall major popularity being relatively cold; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is approximately 377,900, a significant increase from about 112,400 History Category candidates in 2025, and the scale of History Category candidates is expected to expand simultaneously, intensifying competition; Donghua University is located in Shanghai, which has strong regional appeal for Yunnan History Category candidates; in 2025, only 4 History Category students were enrolled, which is a very small-scale enrollment.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering multiple factors such as the 2025 baseline ranking of 2302, the 2026 History Category expansion of 1 student (easing competition), the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (intensifying competition), and the clearly discouraging social popularity of Journalism and Communication majors, the effects of expansion and candidate growth partially offset each other. It is expected that the 2026 admission ranking will slightly shift backward compared to 2025 (slightly easier). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 2617, with a range of 2146–3088.
